PROP-01b-partial3-inv-010.text: CowSwap orders must be sell-kind, partially fillable, zero-fee, and ERC20 balance type.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-010.assertion: forall isValidSignature(o): o.kind==SELL AND o.partiallyFillable AND o.feeAmount==0 AND o.balanceERC20

locations.note: feeAmount, kind==KIND_SELL, partiallyFillable, BALANCE_ERC20 enforced at lines 162-172
